---
id: read-all-chat-messages
title: "Mark chat as read"
description: "Marks every message in the chat as read for the current user."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Mark chat as read"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats/{chat_id}/read_all"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Marks every message in the chat as read for the current user.

  as={"h2"}
